creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Samba-ja is updated to samba-2.0.10-ja-1.0 on Jul/07/2001. It
	fixed some security problem included in samba-2.0.9 or prior
	mentioned in FreeBSD-SA-01:45 and it made Japanese handlings
	better in some tools, smbclient etc.

	Two files are removed: files/patch-ca and files/patch-eb.
	Both are merged into samba-ja.

Fix: Here is a diff from ports-current.
